# quantized.uk

> LLM quantization intelligence for developers running models on consumer hardware.

## What this site is

- Static reference site (no model hosting, no accounts)
- 63+ quantized LLM index with VRAM, speed, and quality metadata
- Tools: VRAM calculator, format wizard, CLI generator, model compare
- 22 deployment cookbook guides (llama.cpp, Ollama, vLLM, Docker, WSL2)
- Real-hardware benchmarks (RTX 4090/3090, Apple Silicon)

## Key URLs

- Home: https://quantized.uk/
- Model index: https://quantized.uk/quant-hub/
- VRAM calculator: https://quantized.uk/tools/vram-calc/
- Cookbook: https://quantized.uk/cookbook/
- Benchmarks: https://quantized.uk/benchmarks/
- About: https://quantized.uk/about/
- Sitemap: https://quantized.uk/sitemap.xml

## Languages

English default UI; Chinese toggle (client-side, same URLs).

## Contact

No public source repository link. See /about/ for maintenance and update policy.
